description: CompositionBlack polo neck t-shirt made of PES, has short sleeves, concealed pocket on left chest with button and a buttoned placketFittingComfortWash careonly hand wash gentlyDo not machine washWash with like coloursWash and iron inside outDo not use fabric softenerUse mild detergent onlyDo not iron on motif/print/trims/logoLightweight and stylish, this polo neck tee from adidas gives a great comfortable feel and looks stylish. With PES fabric, the tee conforms to the contours to the shape of the body, ensuring a perfect Fit, while keeping the body free from sweat. Team this with denim shorts or a white tennis skirt for an action filled day at the Sports club.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
